summary.key_theme: 華爾街分析師近期密集上調 Southern Company 的評級與目標價，反映市場對其長期成長潛力與營運穩定性的高度信心。

bullish.title: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Southern, Raises Price Target to $112
bullish.reason: 分析師 Shelby Tucker 將目標價從 $108 上調至 $112，顯示對公司未來獲利能力的看好，直接推升市場信心。

bullish.title: Evercore ISI Group Upgrades Southern to Outperform, Raises Price Target to $111
bullish.reason: 分析師 Nicholas Amicucci 將評級從 In-Line 上調至 Outperform，顯示該機構認為 Southern 的表現將優於大盤。

bullish.title: Southern’s Record US$26.5b DOE Loan And What It Means For Valuation
bullish.reason: 獲得美國能源部 265 億美元的創紀錄貸款，顯著降低了公司的資本成本，為長期基礎設施建設提供強大資金支持。

bullish.title: Keybanc Upgrades Southern to Sector Weight
bullish.reason: 將評級從 Underweight 上調至 Sector Weight，代表分析師對該股的負面看法已消除，轉向中性偏多。

bullish.title: How Investors Are Reacting To Southern (SO) Analyst Upgrades And A Key Leadership Appointment
bullish.reason: Mississippi Power 任命 Fredie Carmichael 為副總裁，顯示公司內部管理層結構調整，有助於區域業務穩定。

bearish.title: Is Southern Company Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
bearish.reason: 探討股價相對於 S&P 500 指數的表現，若長期落後大盤可能引發部分追求成長型投資人的賣壓。

neutral.title: Southern Stock: A Deep Dive Into Analyst Perspectives (13 Ratings)
neutral.reason: 彙整 13 位分析師的綜合觀點，提供市場對該股的共識評級，屬於資訊整理性質。

neutral.title: Is Southern (SO) Still Attractively Priced After Strong Multi Year Share Gains?
neutral.reason: 針對股價長期上漲後的估值合理性進行討論，提醒投資人關注獲利回吐風險。

neutral.title: What Does the Market Think About Southern Co?
neutral.reason: 市場情緒概覽，未提供具體利多或利空消息，僅為市場關注度分析。

neutral.title: Evercore ISI Group Upgrades Southern (SO)
neutral.reason: 重複報導 Evercore ISI 的評級上調，作為資訊更新，無額外分析價值。

neutral.title: Keybanc Upgrades Southern (SO)
neutral.reason: 重複報導 Keybanc 的評級上調，僅為數據同步。
